original: Coming soon from Bright Water: Chemaster Armor! Paragoons may think they have the market cornered with their bulky defensive plates and projected barriers, but what good is Geddanium-alloy against an aerosolized aphrodisiac mist? None at all. Chemaster Armor includes a built-in synthesizer capable of countering many common intoxicants and drugs - as well as an automatic stimulant injector to counter fatigue or weaponized depressants. Chemaster Armor: Master chems, master life. Known to cause slight amounts of taint. Check your Codex for details.
